title: taraxacum tortilobum
intro: Taraxacum tortilobum, also known as the creeping dandelion or small-flowered dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve liver and gallbladder issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum tortilobum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and support the health of the digestive system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum tortilobum include tea, tincture, and capsules, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
